summary: Phase 3 (Wiring) implementation complete and fully verified. Critical review findings (async side effects, workspace leaks) and important improvements (early termination, test injection) addressed.
learnings: Ensured side effects in emitWorkerExit are awaited to prevent race conditions during state transitions.
Implemented early turn loop termination in AgentRunner when success: true is reported.
Added optional constructor overrides for tracker and backend to enable clean integration testing without polluting production code paths.
